mapper.sql: id, from_id, to_id, conversation_id, content, status, create_time
from_id, to_id, conversation_id, content, status, create_time
( from_id = 0 or ( from_id = 1 and conversation_id in ('comment', 'like', 'follow', 'moderation') ) )
mapper.select: select from message where id in ( select max(id) from message where status != 2 and not and (from_id = #{userId} or to_id = #{userId}) group by conversation_id ) order by id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(m.maxid) from ( select max(id) as maxid from message where status != 2 and not and (from_id = #{userId} or to_id = #{userId}) group by conversation_id ) as m
select from message where status != 2 and not and conversation_id = #{conversationId} and (from_id = #{userId} or to_id = #{userId}) order by id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(id) from message where status != 2 and not and conversation_id = #{conversationId}
